## File

Example: `skills/wordpress-plugin-dev/references/wordpress-security.md`

## Unclear Or Outdated Section

What section needs attention?

## Suggested Correction

What should it say instead?

## Official Source Link

Add an official source link when the correction depends on platform/tool behavior:
